title: rosa pumila var. rosamundi
intro: Rosa pumila var. rosamundi, also known as Dwarf Wild Rose or Dwarf Rose, is a compact, shrub-like plant belonging to the rose family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. Rosa pumila var. rosamundi is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, or used topically in the form of a salve or ointment to harness its medicinal properties.
